description:
A time tracker and timesheet app that lets you track work hours across projects.


- Onboarding survey added.
- Application logs improved.
- Mini timer UI and visual layout improved.
- Disable required fields validation for the running entry.
- WebSockets implementation improved.
- Fix: Unable to stop the timer when idle time is enabled.
- Fix: Timer won't stop upon PC shutdown.
- Fix: Details window starts flickering when user attempts to edit an entry.
- Fix: Auto Tracker 404 error fix when uploading items.
- Fix: Auto Tracker duplicated items fix.
- Other bug fixes and performance improvements.
